accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text; the conditions on each conveyance are accurately described.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; water rights identification numbers are correctly cited from the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: transferring federal lands to Utah for three state parks.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill does not amend existing statutory law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Covers the key conditions including easements, specific water rights, reversionary interest, and cost allocation.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 180-day deadline and December 23, 2024 enactment date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three conveyances and their conditions.

concise.why: Reasonably concise while covering essential provisions without reproducing all sub-details.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies Secretaries of Interior and Agriculture, BLM, National Forest System, and all three parks.

correct_figures.why: 180-day deadline, water rights numbers, and December 23, 2024 date are all correct.
